Container.Name: StarshipHUD
Container.Overview: Immersive, diegetic spaceship HUD for tabletop RPG campaigns. The GM designs panels and drives scenes while players view ship status, systems, and alerts in real-time. Features customizable widgets, crew tracking, cargo management, sensor contacts, and more.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Persistent storage for database and uploads

Config.Name: Enable Authentication
Config.Description: Require login to access the HUD. Set to 'true' to enable.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Session signing key. Required if AUTH_ENABLED is true. Generate with: python -c 'import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))'

Config.Name: Admin Username
Config.Description: Username for the initial admin account

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Password for the initial admin account. If empty, a random password will be generated and logged on first startup.

Config.Name: Session Lifetime (Days)
Config.Description: How many days before login sessions expire

Config.Name: Seed Demo Ship
Config.Description: Create demo 'ISV Constellation' ship on first boot. Set to 'false' for a blank database.
